questionHtml: State whether it would be appropriate for Chester to use the equation of a regression line for y on x to predict a country’s Eurovision score. Justify your answer.
markschemeHtml:
not appropriate (“no” is sufficient)          A1

as r is too close to zero / too weak a correlation          R1

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: State whether it would be appropriate for Chester to use the equation of a regression line for y on x to predict a country’s Eurovision score. Justify your answer.
